definition.en: The tissue capsule is actually an energy field boundary ... At the same time it protects the whole self from certain radiations which do not here concern you. No living consciousness exists on any plane without this tissue capsule enclosing it.
definition.zh: 组织胶囊实际上是一个能量场边界……同时它保护整个自己免受某些在此与你无关的辐射。任何层面上的活意识都没有不被这个组织胶囊包裹而存在的。

definition.en: It is actually a field, that is energy field, boundary. It protects the inner self by acting as a barrier that keeps the whole self's energy controlled, and keeps it from seeping away. At the same time it protects the whole self from certain radiations which do not here concern you. No living consciousness exists on any plane without this tissue capsule enclosing it.
definition.zh: 它实际上是一个场，即能量场边界。它通过充当屏障来保护内在自己，保持整个自己的能量受控，并防止其渗漏。同时它保护整个自己免受某些在此与你无关的辐射。任何层面上的活意识都没有不被这个组织胶囊包裹而存在的。

definition.en: The tissue capsule of which I have spoken earlier surrounds every living consciousness. To some extent it could be compared to an extra layer of skin surrounding the physical body, except that it is not constructed in the same manner upon your plane, and is invisible to you under ordinary circumstances.
definition.zh: 我之前说过的组织胶囊包裹着每一个活意识。在某种程度上它可以被比作围绕肉体的一层额外皮肤，只不过它在你们的层面上不是以相同方式构建的，并且在通常情况下对你来说是不可见的。

definition.en: I have mentioned in the past that everything does have a form or a tissue capsule and field of energy.
definition.zh: 我过去曾提到，每样事物确实都有一个形态或一个组织胶囊和能量场。

explanation: 组织囊本质上是包裹每个生命意识的能量场边界。它像一层无形的皮肤，保护内在自我不被能量流失，同时阻挡某些特定辐射。任何层面的生命意识都必须被组织囊包裹才能存在。这个囊并非物理实体，而是由电磁成分构成，在普通情况下不可见。有趣的是，来自其他实相的存在者无法看到人类的物理伪装结构，却能直接看到组织囊。组织囊具有伸缩特性，可以像脉搏一样规律性地扩张和收缩。这种扩张是一种意识延伸的体验，类似于宇宙膨胀理论——但赛斯强调，宇宙并非真的在空间中膨胀，这种表象其实是组织囊能量场的扩张扭曲。组织囊的本质就是所谓的星光体，即未被物质化的那部分人格。

quotes.text: yhe tissue capsule is actually an energy field boundary ... At the same time it protects the whole self from certain radiations which do not here concern you. No living consciousness exists on any plane without this tissue capsule enclosing it ... To some inhabitants of other planes [realities] that have access to your plane, all that can be seen of you is this capsule, since such inhabitants have had no experience in your particular type of camouflage [physical] construction. Therefore your camouflage patterns are invisible to them, but the tissue capsules are not.1
quotes.translation: 组织囊实际上是一个能量场边界……同时它保护整个自己免受某些与你们无关的辐射影响。任何层面的活意识都必须被这个组织囊包裹才能存在……对于能进入你们层面的其他层面[实相]的居民而言，他们能看到的你只是这个囊，因为这类居民从未体验过你们特定类型的伪装[物质]构造。因此你们的伪装模式对他们不可见，但组织囊却可见。

quotes.text: Now. As you know, the inner senses belong to that part of human personality that is not physically materialized. At various times I have spoken concerning the reality of what you refer to as the astral body. You must remember that over a year ago we discussed tissue capsules. The astral body is of this nature. It is composed of electromagnetic components. It is simply the unseen self.
quotes.translation: 现在。如你们所知，内在感官属于人类人格中未物质化的部分。我曾多次谈到你们所谓的星光体的实相。你们必须记得一年多前我们讨论过组织囊。星光体就具有这种性质。它由电磁成分组成。它其实就是那个看不见的自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is actually a field, that is energy field, boundary. It protects the inner self by acting as a barrier that keeps the whole self's energy controlled, and keeps it from seeping away. At the same time it protects the whole self from certain radiations which do not here concern you. No living consciousness exists on any plane without this tissue capsule enclosing it.
quotes.translation: 它实际上是一个场，即能量场边界。它通过充当屏障来保护内在自己，使整个自己的能量保持受控，防止能量泄漏。同时它保护整个自己免受某些与你们无关的辐射影响。任何层面的活意识都必须被这个组织囊包裹才能存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: For fun, think of the expanding tissue capsule in terms of or in connection with, the theory of your expanding universe. Such contemplation should be excellent exercise. This is quite evocative, and I hope I can peek in sometime when you are trying to deal with it.
quotes.translation: 不妨将不断扩展的组织囊与你们宇宙膨胀的理论联系起来思考，这会是极佳的思维训练。这个主题极具启发性，希望某日能窥见你处理此课题时的思考过程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The tissue capsule of which I have spoken earlier surrounds every living consciousness. To some extent it could be compared to an extra layer of skin surrounding the physical body, except that it is not constructed in the same manner upon your plane, and is invisible to you under ordinary circumstances.
quotes.translation: 我先前提及的组织囊包裹着每个活生生的意识。某种程度上可比拟为环绕肉体的额外皮肤层，只是它在你们层面并非以相同方式构成，寻常情况下肉眼不可见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
